creator: dcp2k@163.com
text:
today i upgrade my freebsd to  the newest package, and then i got vlc can not exit problem.  when i click 'X' button to close vlc , the vlc will disapper but i found vlc process still living in the system .  
if i use vlc file menu to close itselfe , it will close probably.

i have already tried to reinstall vlc , the issue is same.

so i have to use kill -9 to kill dead process
